description.value: You're so familiar with the paperwork necessary to maintain your cover that you can easily whip up documents that support your fabrications. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Create Forgery]{Create a Forgery} using [[/act create-forgery skill=deception]]{Deception}, rather than Society, and doing so only takes 10 minutes, or 1 minute if you're legendary in Deception. With your paranoid nature, you're always on the lookout for forgeries. The GM rolls a secret Perception or Society check for you any time you encounter a forgery, even if you don't examine it closely.
